name: devforge
description: A controlled Claude Code loop for coding and review work. devforge runs triage, request verification, design, implementation, oracle checks, blind reviewers, final reviewers, and merge approval through durable .devforge files. The design gate is the only plan-mode stop before source edits; merge uses a plain chat confirmation. Provides /devforge plus the human-only /devforge-approve-design and /devforge-approve-merge fallbacks.
